name: OpenGrok
description: OpenGrok — Fast, powerful source code search and cross-reference engine from Oracle for large codebases.

seo.title: OpenGrok — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: OpenGrok: OpenGrok — Fast, powerful source code search and cross-reference engine from Oracle for large codebases.

when_to_use: Running self-hosted code search over large multi-repo collections
Navigating and cross-referencing code in legacy enterprise codebases
Building internal developer portals with indexed code search
Indexing historical codebases for compliance and audit access

pros: Battle-tested source search at Oracle and other enterprises
Good cross-referencing for static code navigation
Supports many languages out of the box
Fully self-hosted with no SaaS dependency
cons: Setup and reindexing is slow and operationally heavy
UI and UX feel aged compared to Sourcegraph
No AI features, purely lexical search and xref
review.verdict: Reliable old-guard code search that still works, but newer tools offer much better developer experience.
review.best_for: Enterprises with air-gapped requirements and existing OpenGrok deployments
review.not_for: Teams starting fresh or expecting modern UI and AI-assisted navigation

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
